Package com.airtribe.meditrack.service

Class BillService

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.service.BillService
public class BillService extends Object
Service class for billing management with Strategy pattern implementation. Demonstrates use of BillFactory and multiple BillingStrategy implementations.

  • Constructor Details

    • BillService

      public BillService(DataStore<Bill> billStore, AppointmentService appointmentService)

  • Method Details

    • createBill

      public Bill createBill(String appointmentId, double consultationFee, String strategyType) throws AppointmentNotFoundException, InvalidDataException
      Create a bill for an appointment with a specific billing strategy. Demonstrates Factory pattern for bill creation.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      consultationFee - the consultation fee
      strategyType - the type of billing strategy to use
      Returns:
      the created bill
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException
      InvalidDataException

    • createSimpleBill

      public Bill createSimpleBill(String appointmentId, double consultationFee) throws AppointmentNotFoundException, InvalidDataException
      Create a bill with consultation fee only (default strategy).
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      consultationFee - the consultation fee
      Returns:
      the created bill
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException
      InvalidDataException

    • getBillById

      public Optional<Bill> getBillById(String billId)
      Get a bill by ID.
      Parameters:
      billId - the bill ID
      Returns:
      Optional containing the bill or empty

    • getAllBills

      public List<Bill> getAllBills()
      Get all bills.
      Returns:
      list of all bills

    • getBillsByPatient

      public List<Bill> getBillsByPatient(String patientId)
      Get bills for a specific patient. Uses Streams API for filtering.
      Parameters:
      patientId - the patient ID
      Returns:
      list of bills for the patient

    • getBillsByDoctor

      public List<Bill> getBillsByDoctor(String doctorId)
      Get bills for a specific doctor. Uses Streams API for filtering.
      Parameters:
      doctorId - the doctor ID
      Returns:
      list of bills for the doctor

    • getPaidBills

      public List<Bill> getPaidBills()
      Get paid bills. Uses Streams API for filtering.
      Returns:
      list of paid bills

    • getUnpaidBills

      public List<Bill> getUnpaidBills()
      Get unpaid bills. Uses Streams API for filtering.
      Returns:
      list of unpaid bills

    • addCharges

      public boolean addCharges(String billId, double labCharges, double medicineCharges) throws AppointmentNotFoundException
      Add charges to a bill and recalculate amount.
      Parameters:
      billId - the bill ID
      labCharges - the lab charges to add
      medicineCharges - the medicine charges to add
      Returns:
      true if updated, false otherwise
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException

    • markBillAsPaid

      public boolean markBillAsPaid(String billId) throws AppointmentNotFoundException
      Mark bill as paid.
      Parameters:
      billId - the bill ID
      Returns:
      true if marked paid, false otherwise
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException

    • calculateTotalRevenue

      public double calculateTotalRevenue()
      Calculate total revenue from paid bills. Uses Streams API for aggregation.
      Returns:
      total revenue

    • getTotalBills

      public int getTotalBills()
      Get total number of bills.
      Returns:
      total bills count
